verdict.note: Real browser at #/evals: two-column master-detail — LEFT the evals-feed (video-first chip, one title-only row, NO tab switcher), RIGHT the EventDetail (video + review-track scrubber + verdict + remark composer). Rail Evals entry accented. Selection IS detail. Direct #/evals reload keeps the page (hash routing). Peer of graph/board/issues.

Browser YATU (:5233 rig): #/evals renders the master-detail with the SLIM list — measured grid '280px 1240px' (was 380px); fold toggle → 'fv-master folded', detail 1498px wide, thin strip unfolds with filters+rows intact (1 video row / 67 under 'all'); j/k across 67 rows moved selection+detail (j then k returned); selection renders the event-detail workspace (stage + A/B header + remark rail); direct reload at #/evals lands on the page. 0 errors.

Isolated-clone rig @5e4a04e (backend:8901 vite:5201), real browser. Rail entry #3 → hash #/evals + rail accented; two-column master-detail, list column MEASURED 279px (≤~280), chipbar present, NO Evals|Threads switcher; fold → detail 1498px of a 1600 viewport (list collapsed), unfold restores 279px with chips+selection intact; row select → right pane renders the event-detail workspace (A/B strip + remark rail), selection IS detail; j moves selection+detail (ab-history-flip→workspace-no-pingpong), k returns; direct reload at #/evals lands on the Evals page — the graph stays background-mounted but INVISIBLE (offsetParent null, rect 0), no flash-through. Screenshots: final state + folded state.

Real browser (headless Chromium, vite:5231 + backend:8931, worktree code). Row click → hash echoes #/evals/event-detail/annotate-seek-circle-file; j/k hops rewrite the hash with REPLACE (history.length constant at 2 across hops). Fresh load at that canonical address selects exactly that (node,scenario), detail renders it. Deep link to a transcript eval (board-delta/delta-beats-snapshot) the default video chip hides → feed widens its own kind chip to 'all', row visible+selected, hash kept. Bogus #/evals/no-such/nope → falls back to first row and hash canonicalizes to its real address.
headless-Chromium re-measure at 1623280b: #/evals master list + detail pane, picking a row selects it and the hash echoes #/evals/video-evidence/video-plays-in-eval-tab.
headless-Chromium re-measure at 1623280b: deep-loading #/evals/video-evidence/video-plays-in-eval-tab in a fresh tab lands on that exact reading (title matches).

Restyled shared list chrome, structure intact: #/evals two-col master-detail, slim left col measured 280px, feed rows now UNIFORM single-line (all 29px; scenario truncates, no ragged wrap), kind filter chips are a segmented pill set with the active chip accent-filled, no tab switcher, selection-is-detail, j/k moves the one selection while a key typed in an input does not, fold collapses to a 22px strip and unfold restores selection. Reads as one surface with the Issues picker.
